name: Asaptic (HK) Limited
description: Factory-direct, regulatory-filtered sourcing of certified clinical devices and deep-tech components for Western and Global-South B2B buyers. Principal-reseller (not a broker): Asaptic is the commercial counterparty, carries the compliance/QA/accountability layer, and delivers a full compliance document package with every shipment.

model.payment_terms: 30% deposit on proforma invoice; 70% balance against bill of lading
model.buyer_working_capital: near-zero (deposit funds the factory; balance due against shipping documents)

lanes.notes: Immediate route = sub-distribute behind an already-registered brand (e.g. InBody); medium-term = OEM via a 510(k)-cleared maker (e.g. SELVAS/ACCUNIQ). EU public tenders >=EUR5M require Korean/Taiwan origin (EU IPI Reg 2025/1197).

lanes.sources: Remote patient monitoring (RPM) / connected-health devices (BP, SpO2, glucose, cellular health hubs)
Thin-film lithium niobate (TFLN/LNOI) wafers and electro-optic modulators
lanes.notes: FDPR does not attach to bare China-origin TFLN wafers (EAR99). 5-business-day sample availability for standard specs.

lanes.sources: Solar/hybrid inverters, LFP battery energy storage (BESS), EV chargers
AI data-center liquid cold plates, CDUs, manifolds, quick-disconnects (GB200/GB300 class)
GaN power devices and GaN fast chargers (power, not RF)
lanes.notes: GaN RF is defense-sensitive and excluded. Gallium is China-export-controlled.

lanes.sources: Humanoid-robot actuators, harmonic drives, frameless torque motors, integrated joint modules
lanes.notes: China drives ~$300-600 vs Japanese ~$800-1500. Bundles with tactile e-skin as a Physical-AI components offering.

lanes.sources: Tactile e-skin and flexible multimodal (pressure/shear/temp) force-sensor arrays
compliance: verify HS for AI-chip-embedded sensors (China dual-use Dec-2024)
lanes.notes: Fills the SynTouch/BioTac (shut 2023) gap. US Section 301 is origin-based — HK routing does not avoid it; EU-first for US-tariff-sensitive buyers.

engagement.rfq: email a specification brief (product, quantity, target market) to engage@asaptic.com; machine-readable RFQ endpoint and MCP server planned

disclaimer: Asaptic is an independent sourcing partner. Compliance listings are compiled from public registries; verify the current record before procurement. Informational, not legal/regulatory advice.
